reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Great quality and craftsmanship! I love how it fits perfectly around the Arctis Nova pro wireless hub. It also has very strong magnets that work with my secret labs magnus desk. I love how it helps things within reach and keeps my desk clear. Genius!

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text:
Beware that the Facecam Neo plate lens opening is wrongly sized.  
This print doesn't fully cover the white plastic, which is essential for it to not shine through the image when using it.
The provider wasn't interested in trying to fix the design and I had to fix it by adding black tape around the opening.
Besides that, the fit of the camera mount is all good.  Just lacks attention to detail in getting the lens opening correct. Very disappointed in a custom print not being sized correctly for this camera.
